1 INTRODUCTION 
1.1 SUMMARY 
This document is the user manual for the CMEMS Ocean Monitoring I ndicator (OMI) 
IBI_OMI_CURRENTS_cui: it provides data of upwelling index in the coast of IBI domain from 
26N to 42N. 
OMI_OMI_CURRENTS_cui product is organised of two datasets:  
• IBI_OMI_CURRENTS_cui_index which contains monthly mean time series of upwelling 
index in the continental coasts of
